display_name: Expose code-server via ngrok + Full Service Verification
description: Start ngrok HTTP tunnel for code-server (port 8092). Run full verification of all Worker 1 services: site_kb_server, Ollama qwen2.5, Ollama proxy via ngrok, code-server. Run qwen2.5 test generation. Write worker1_services.json config file and commit to repo so Windows IDE auto-discovers all endpoints.
